_README: Configuration for the overall composite (Module 3). All magic numbers from the design doc live here. Adjustable without touching logic files.

_schema.knnK: Number of nearest historical neighbors used for outcome-tier distribution. Spec default 30.
_schema.outcomeTierScores: Per-tier point value used in E[outcome] = sum(p_tier * score_tier).
_schema.starShape: Rewards specialist profiles with one elite trait + a strong supporting trait.
_schema.redFlags: Per-flag deduction + activation rule. Total capped at maxTotalDeduction.
_schema.confidence: Sigma derivation. Combines NN-outcome variance + missing-data penalty.

starShape._note: Activated only when at least one trait is z>=1.5 AND a second trait z>=0.5. Bonus = min(maxBonus, slope * (maxZ - eliteThreshold)).

ageFlag._note: Older prospect (age > ageThreshold) with weak production (OBPM below posFam-median).

lengthFlag._note: Wingspan less than height — applies only to wings + bigs (guards rarely have a length advantage).

archetypeFingerprintFlag._note: The prospect's stat fingerprint diverges from their stated archetype anchor by >fingerprintDistanceSigma standard deviations in z-space. Hand-coded archetypes that don't actually fit produce this flag.

sosFlag._note: DEFERRED until KenPom subscription. School-strength quartile detection requires conference-level SOS data.

confidence._note: sigma = clip(sigmaFromOutcomeVariance + sigmaFromMissingData, sigmaMin, sigmaMax). sigmaFromOutcomeVariance is the std-dev of p_tier outcome scores in the 30-NN. sigmaFromMissingData adds 0.5 per missing 'core' feature (max 4 features).
